caretIndex.description: Caret offset within the anchor value.

query.description: Query text after the trigger character. Bindable. Default `''`.

offset.description: Distance in px between the caret and menu. Default `6`.

unsupportedProps.name: anchor
unsupportedProps.description: Text field used as the caret-position anchor.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Optional empty state rendered after item registration settles.

unsupportedProps.name: items
unsupportedProps.description: Render command items for the current query.

unsupportedProps.name: ondismiss
unsupportedProps.description: Invoked when Escape or outside pointerdown dismisses the menu.

unsupportedProps.name: onselect
unsupportedProps.description: Invoked when an enabled command is activated.

unsupportedProps.name: onstatechange
unsupportedProps.description: One-way state output for host-owned field ARIA.
